JUDGMENT IS ENTERED IN CONFORMITY WITH AWARD. ALL REFERENCES TO NASD CASE NO. 03-03386 BE EXPUNGED FROM CHRIS A. MELTON'S REGISTRATION RECORDS MAINTAINED BY THE NASD'S CENTRAL REGITRATION DEPOSITORY.
